abilities.description: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target noncreature land you control. Untap it. It becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with vigilance and haste that's still a land.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target noncreature land you control

abilities.description: You get an emblem with "Lands you control have indestructible." Search your library for any number of Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

triggers.description: Whenever you tap a Forest for mana, add an additional {G}.
